system.description: You own a sailing ship. This is a Boon that can be taken multiple times, and can be shared between multiple people in a group. For each Ship Boon in the group, the ship has 1 point of Size. Thus, a single Boon would be a Size 1 ship, while three could have a Size 3 ship, etc. Aside from its Size, the ship has an additional 5 points to spend on its other Ship Qualities. Instead of Size, one Boon (after the first) can instead add 2 points to the pool of Ship Qualities.
